approval.note: Use an isolated Commonworld worktree. Before every nontrivial merge require complete published diff, head/tree/diff-bound self-review, green CI, review resolution and exact live Pages readback.

title: Scale static machine access and public findability
goal: Improve static loading, search indexing and discoverability without introducing a backend before measured need.

acceptance.assertion: Overview/search data load compactly and full records load on focus without all-or-nothing failure.
Text preference does not eagerly pay the full map runtime cost.
Derived search/layer data and unchanged geometry avoid repeated work.
Canonical, OpenGraph, JSON-LD, sitemap and stable project HTML pages are published.
Backend, PMTiles or vector search remain blocked until measured catalog/traffic thresholds justify them.
